messages.content: Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Find compounds whose name ends with 'one' that are used to treat the 'hypertension'. What genes do they downregulate?
MATCH (c1:Compound)-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease {name: 'hypertension'}) MATCH (g1:Gene)<-[:DOWNREGULATES_CdG]-(c1) WHERE c1.name ENDS WITH 'one' RETURN c1.name AS Compound1, g1.name AS Gene1
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes on chromosome 'X' that are covaried with genes participate in the pathway named 'Apoptosis'?
MATCH (p:Pathway {name: 'Apoptosis'})<-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]-(g1:Gene)-[:COVARIES_GcG]->(g2:Gene) WHERE g2.chromosome = 'X' RETURN g2.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List cellular components whose name contains 'collagene' in which the genes which are either upregulated in the 'ear' or expressed in the 'sense organ' participate.

MATCH (cc:CellularComponent)<-[:PARTICIPATES_GpCC]-(g:Gene) WHERE (g)<-[:UPREGULATES_AuG]-(:Anatomy {name: 'ear'}) OR (g)<-[:EXPRESSES_AeG]-(:Anatomy {name: 'sense organ'}) AND cc.name CONTAINS 'collagen' RETURN g.name, cc.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes whose name starts with 'HIST' participate in the cellular component with identifier 'GO:0000784' or with name 'histone deacetylase complex'?
MATCH (g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpCC]->(cc:CellularComponent) WHERE (cc.identifier = 'GO:0000784' OR cc.name = 'histone deacetylase complex') AND g.name STARTS WITH 'HIST' RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the distinct anatomical locations whose name include 'system' associated with genes in cellular component with identifier 'GO:0034677' or with name 'nuclear chromosome, telomeric region'?

MATCH (a:Anatomy)-[b:EXPRESSES_AeG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpCC]->(cc:CellularComponent)  WHERE (cc.name = 'nuclear chromosome, telomeric region' OR cc.identifier = 'GO:0034677') AND a.name CONTAINS 'system' RETURN DISTINCT a.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which five genes participate in the fewest cellular components (breaking ties alphabetically according to gene name)?
MATCH (g:Gene)-[r:PARTICIPATES_GpCC]->(cc:CellularComponent) WITH g, COUNT(r) AS participationCount RETURN g.name, participationCount ORDER BY participationCount ASC, g.name ASC LIMIT 5
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which distinct genes participate in both cellular components and pathways as the gene 'HIST1H4F' and are located on chromosome '1'?

MATCH (g1:Gene {name: 'HIST1H4F'})-[:PARTICIPATES_GpCC]->(cc:CellularComponent), (g1)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(pw:Pathway), (g2:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpCC]->(cc) WHERE (g2)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(pw) AND g2.chromosome = '1' RETURN DISTINCT g2.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Retrieve diseases that are similar to 'obesity' and have associated genes located on chromosome 9.
MATCH (d1:Disease {name: 'obesity'})-[:RESEMBLES_DrD]->(d2:Disease)-[:ASSOCIATES_DaG]->(g:Gene) WHERE g.chromosome = '9' RETURN d2.name, g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Retrieve genes whose names contain 'USP', such that they interact with a gene that participates in both the 'Cell Cycle' and 'DNA Repair' pathways.

MATCH (g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p1:Pathway {name: 'Cell Cycle'}), (g)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p2:Pathway {name: 'DNA Repair'}), (g)-[:INTERACTS_GiG]->(g1:Gene) WHERE g1.name CONTAINS'USP' RETURN g1.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which distinct molecular functions related to 'RNA' do genes that participate in the biological process 'regulation of heart contraction' also participate in?
MATCH (bp:BiologicalProcess {name: 'regulation of heart contraction'})<-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]-(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpMF]->(mf:MolecularFunction) mf.name CONTAINS 'RNA' RETURN DISTINCT mf.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What distinct GTPase-related molecular functions do genes participating in the biological process 'cytokinesis' or 'chemotaxis' participate in

MATCH (g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]->(bp:BiologicalProcess), (g)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpMF]->(mf:MolecularFunction) WHERE (bp.name = 'cytokinesis' OR bp.name = 'chemotaxis') AND mf.name CONTAINS 'GTPase' RETURN DISTINCT mf.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which biological process has the fewest participating genes, breaking ties alphabetically by biological process name?
MATCH (g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]->(bp:BiologicalProcess) RETURN bp.name, COUNT(g) AS gene_count ORDER BY gene_count ASC, bp.name ASC LIMIT 1
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which pharmacologic class has the minimum number of compounds (breaking ties alphabetically according to pharmacologic class name), and what is the count?
MATCH (p:PharmacologicClass)-[:INCLUDES_PCiC]->(c:Compound) RETURN p.name, COUNT(c) AS compound_count ORDER BY compound_count ASC, p.name ASC LIMIT 1
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List symptoms whose name contains 'Pain'. Which are associated with diseases that localize to 'liver'?
MATCH (a:Anatomy {name: 'liver'})<-[:LOCALIZES_DlA]-(d:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s:Symptom) WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'Pain' RETURN s.name AS symptom_name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List genes on chromosome 'Y' that are co-expressed in the lung and sense organ.
MATCH (a1:Anatomy {name: 'sense organ'})-[:EXPRESSES_AeG]->(g:Gene) MATCH (a2:Anatomy {name: 'lung'})-[:EXPRESSES_AeG]->(g) WHERE g.chromosome = 'Y' RETURN g.name AS GeneName
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List distinct RNA-related pathways in which the genes that interact with gene 'DFFA' participate.
MATCH (g:Gene)-[:INTERACTS_GiG]->(g1:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p:Pathway) WHERE g.name = 'DFFA' AND p.name CONTAINS 'RNA' RETURN DISTINCT g1.name,p.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Retrieve distinct blood-related anatomical locations that diseases presenting the symptom 'Fever' localize to.
MATCH (s:Symptom {name: 'Fever'})<-[:PRESENTS_DpS]-(d:Disease)-[:LOCALIZES_DlA]->(a:Anatomy) WHERE a.name CONTAINS 'blood' RETURN DISTINCT a.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which five genes are expressed in the highest number of distinct anatomical locations (breaking ties alphabetically according to gene name)?
MATCH (a:Anatomy)-[:EXPRESSES_AeG]->(g:Gene) RETURN g.name, COUNT(DISTINCT a) AS expression_count ORDER BY expression_count DESC, g.name ASC LIMIT 5
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Look for compunds whose name ends with 'nin' and which downregulate the genes participating the biological process 'endocytosis' or 'viral process'.
MATCH (c:Compound)-[:DOWNREGULATES_CdG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]->(bp:BiologicalProcess) WHERE c.name ENDS WITH 'nin' AND bp.name in ['endocytosis', 'viral process'] RETURN DISTINCT c.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which disease associated with genes is linked to the highest number of pathways (breaking ties alphabetically according to disease name), and what is that number?
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:ASSOCIATES_DaG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p:Pathway) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS pathway_count RETURN d.name, pathway_count ORDER BY pathway_count DESC, d.name ASC LIMIT 1
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Find unique diseases upregulating or downregulating the genes which participate in the pathway 'Oxidative phosphorylation'.
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:UPREGULATES_DuG|DOWNREGULATES_DdG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(pw:Pathway {name: 'Oxidative phosphorylation'}) RETURN DISTINCT d.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Retrieve two genes both in the same chromosome ('1') interacting with each other and both of them participate in the pathway 'Vpu mediated degradation of CD4'.

MATCH (g1:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(pw:Pathway {name: 'Vpu mediated degradation of CD4'})<-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]-(g2:Gene) WHERE (g1)-[:INTERACTS_GiG]->(g2) AND g1.chromosome = g2.chromosome AND g1.chromosome = '1' RETURN g1.name, g2.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the compounds whose name start with 'P' that upregulate or downregulate gene whose identifier is 51026?
MATCH (c1:Compound)-[r1:UPREGULATES_CuG]->(g:Gene{identifier:51026})<-[r2:DOWNREGULATES_CdG]-(c2:Compound) WHERE c1.name STARTS WITH 'P' AND c2.name STARTS WITH 'P' RETURN c1.name, c2.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Find genes that are regulated by the gene whose identifier is 83448 and the compounds by which they are bound with actions including 'activator'.
MATCH (g1:Gene{identifier:83448})-[:REGULATES_GrG]->(g2:Gene)<-[r:BINDS_CbG]-(c:Compound) WHERE 'activator' IN r.actions RETURN g1.name, g2.name, c.name, r.actions
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the molecular functions that the genes downregulated by compound 'Nicergoline' participate in?
MATCH (c:Compound {name: 'Nicergoline'})-[r:DOWNREGULATES_CdG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpMF]->(mf:MolecularFunction) RETURN g.name, mf.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Retrieve the names of compounds starting wth the letter 'B' which bind the gene whose name is 'CYP1A2' and where the binding action includes 'inhibitor' or 'substrate'.
MATCH (c:Compound)-[r:BINDS_CbG]->(g:Gene {name: 'CYP1A2'}) WHERE 'inhibitor' IN r.actions OR 'substrate' IN r.actions AND c.name STARTS WITH 'B' RETURN c.name, r.actions
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List diseases that resemble the disease whose identifier is 'DOID:1793'. Skip first two diseases.
MATCH (d1:Disease {identifier: 'DOID:1793'})-[:RESEMBLES_DrD]->(d2:Disease) RETURN d2.name SKIP 2
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Identify the cellular components associated with the genes named 'TP53' and 'BRCA1'.
MATCH (g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpCC]->(cc:CellularComponent) WHERE g.name = 'TP53' OR g.name = 'BRCA1' RETURN cc.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes do not interact with other genes on chromosome 'X'? Return the gene name.
MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE NOT (g)-[:INTERACTS_GiG]->(:Gene {chromosome: 'X'}) RETURN g.name AS gene
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List genes participating in the biological process 'female sex differentiation' that are associated with 'azoospermia'.
MATCH (d:Disease {name: 'azoospermia'})-[:ASSOCIATES_DaG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]->(bp:BiologicalProcess {name: 'female sex differentiation'}) RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Find all genes that are downregulated in 'systemic scleroderma'.
MATCH (d:Disease {name: 'systemic scleroderma'})-[:DOWNREGULATES_DdG]->(g:Gene) RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Retrieve genes associated with either 'diabetes mellitus' or 'hypertension'
MATCH (g:Gene)<-[:ASSOCIATES_DaG]-(d:Disease) WHERE d.name = 'diabetes mellitus' OR d.name = 'hypertension' RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Find diseases associated with genes that are participating either in the 'Wnt signaling pathway' or in the 'Notch signaling pathway'.
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:ASSOCIATES_DaG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(pw:Pathway) WHERE pw.name = 'Wnt signaling pathway' OR pw.name = 'Notch signaling pathway' RETURN d.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List all distinct compounds whose name ends with 'en' that either upregulate or downregulate genes associated with the 'obesity' dosease.
MATCH (c:Compound)-[:UPREGULATES_CuG|:DOWNREGULATES_CdG]->(g:Gene)<-[:ASSOCIATES_DaG]-(d:Disease {name: 'obesity'}) WHERE c.name ENDS WITH 'en' RETURN DISTINCT c.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes are expressed in the 'brain' and either upregulated or downregulated in 'Schizophrenia'?
MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE (g)<-[:EXPRESSES_AeG]-(:Anatomy {name: 'brain'}) AND (g)<-[:UPREGULATES_DuG|DOWNREGULATES_DdG]-(:Disease {name: 'schizophrenia'}) RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What distinct pathways do genes that interact with gene 'BRCA1' participate in?
MATCH (g:Gene {name: 'BRCA1'})-[:INTERACTS_GiG]->(g2:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p:Pathway) RETURN DISTINCT p.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes participate in both the 'DNA Repair' and 'Cell Cycle' pathways?
MATCH (g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p1:Pathway {name: 'DNA Repair'}), (g)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p2:Pathway {name: 'Cell Cycle'}) RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Identify genes that interact with 'MYC' and participate in either 'Cell Cycle' or 'Wnt Signaling' pathways.
MATCH (g:Gene)-[:INTERACTS_GiG]->(:Gene {name: 'MYC'})-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p:Pathway) WHERE p.name = 'Cell Cycle' OR p.name = 'Wnt Signaling' RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Find pathways that the gene 'BRCA1' and the gene with identifier '8357' both participate in.
MATCH (g1:Gene {name: 'BRCA1'})-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p:Pathway), (g2:Gene {identifier: 8357})-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(p) RETURN p.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Identify compounds that upregulate genes involved in the molecular function 'syntaxin binding'.
MATCH (mf:MolecularFunction {name: 'syntaxin binding'})<-[:PARTICIPATES_GpMF]-(g:Gene)<-[:UPREGULATES_CuG]-(c:Compound) RETURN c.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which biological processes do genes participating in the molecular function 'U1 snRNA binding' participate?
MATCH (mf:MolecularFunction {name: 'U1 snRNA binding'})<-[:PARTICIPATES_GpMF]-(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]->(bp:BiologicalProcess) RETURN bp.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List the molecular functions associated with genes that participate in the biological process 'protein sialylation', ordered by the number of participating genes in descending order.
MATCH (bp:BiologicalProcess {name: 'protein sialylation'})<-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]-(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpMF]->(mf:MolecularFunction) RETURN mf.name, COUNT(g) AS gene_count ORDER BY gene_count DESC
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What is the average number of biological processes in which a gene participating in the molecular function 'kinase activity' participate?

MATCH (mf:MolecularFunction {name: 'kinase activity'})<-[:PARTICIPATES_GpMF]-(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]->(bp:BiologicalProcess) WITH g, COUNT(bp) AS process_count RETURN AVG(process_count) AS avg_processes_per_gene
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the distinct side effects whose name mentions 'Acute' caused by compounds that treat 'breast cancer' disease?
MATCH (d:Disease {name: 'breast cancer'})<-[:TREATS_CtD]-(c:Compound)-[:CAUSES_CcSE]->(se:SideEffect) WHERE se.name CONTAINS 'Acute' RETURN DISTINCT se.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes are upregulated by compounds that treat 'melanoma'?
MATCH (d:Disease {name: 'melanoma'})<-[:TREATS_CtD]-(c:Compound)-[:UPREGULATES_CuG]->(g:Gene) RETURN c.name, g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which anatomical locations are affected by diseases treated by the compound 'Linagliptin'?
MATCH (c:Compound {name: 'Linagliptin'})-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease)-[:LOCALIZES_DlA]->(a:Anatomy) RETURN d.name, a.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which symptoms are presented by diseases treated by the compound 'Mesalazine'?
MATCH (c:Compound {name: 'Mesalazine'})-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s:Symptom) RETURN d.name, s.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the pharmacologic classes that include compounds that treat 'migraine'?
MATCH (d:Disease {name: 'migraine'})<-[:TREATS_CtD]-(c:Compound)<-[:INCLUDES_PCiC]-(pc:PharmacologicClass) RETURN c.name, pc.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List compounds that treat diseases localized to either the cardiovascular or respiratory system.
MATCH (c:Compound)-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease)-[:LOCALIZES_DlA]->(a:Anatomy) WHERE a.name = 'cardiovascular system' OR a.name = 'respiratory system' RETURN c.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which distinct compounds treating diseases present symptoms related to 'Pain'?
MATCH (c:Compound)-[:TREATS_CtD]->(:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(:Symptom {name: 'Pain'}) RETURN DISTINCT c.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What side effects are caused by compounds included in the pharmacologic class with the identifier 'N0000007151'?
MATCH (p:PharmacologicClass {identifier: 'N0000007151'})-[:INCLUDES_PCiC]->(c:Compound)-[:CAUSES_CcSE]->(s:SideEffect) RETURN c.name, s.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes are downregulated by compounds included in the pharmacologic class 'Dopamine Uptake Inhibitors'?
MATCH (p:PharmacologicClass {name: 'Dopamine Uptake Inhibitors'})-[:INCLUDES_PCiC]->(c:Compound)-[:DOWNREGULATES_CdG]->(g:Gene) RETURN c.name, g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
List the pharmacologic classes including compounds that treat the disease 'glaucoma', sorted by the pharmacologic class name.
MATCH (p:PharmacologicClass)-[:INCLUDES_PCiC]->(c:Compound)-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease {name: 'glaucoma'}) RETURN p.name, c.name ORDER BY p.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Look for the average number of diseases treated by compounds included in each pharmacologic class.
MATCH (p:PharmacologicClass)-[:INCLUDES_PCiC]->(c:Compound)-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease) WITH p, COUNT(d) AS disease_count RETURN AVG(disease_count) AS average_disease_count
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Identify diseases that present multiple symptoms including 'Headache' and 'Nausea'.
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s1:Symptom {name: 'Headache'}), (d)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s2:Symptom {name: 'Nausea'}) RETURN d.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which symptoms are presented by the disease identified by 'DOID:0060119' or 'DOID:1686'?
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s:Symptom) WHERE d.identifier = 'DOID:0060119' OR d.identifier = 'DOID:1686' RETURN s.name AS symptom_name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Find the average number of diseases that localize to an anatomical part.
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:LOCALIZES_DlA]->(a:Anatomy) WITH a, COUNT(d) AS disease_count RETURN AVG(disease_count) AS avg_diseases_per_anatomy
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes are expressed in the vagina and downregulated in 'lung cancer'?
MATCH (a:Anatomy {name:'vagina'})-[:EXPRESSES_AeG]->(g:Gene)<-[:DOWNREGULATES_DdG]-(:Disease {name: 'lung cancer'}) RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes are expressed in the heart and participate in the regulation of Biological Processes 'reproductive system development'?
MATCH (:Anatomy {name: 'heart'})-[:EXPRESSES_AeG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]->(bp:BiologicalProcess {name: 'reproductive system development'}) RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which pairs of distinct genes on chromosome 2 both participate in the same pathway and are both associated with the molecular function 'frizzled binding'? Return the two gene names.

MATCH (g1:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(pw:Pathway) MATCH (g1)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpMF]->(mf:MolecularFunction {name: 'frizzled binding'}) MATCH (g2:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpPW]->(pw) WHERE (mf)<-[:PARTICIPATES_GpMF]-(g2) AND g2.name <> g1.name AND g1.chromosome = g2.chromosome = '2' RETURN g1.name AS GeneName1, g2.name AS GeneName2
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What is the average number of genes expressed in the anatomical structure?
MATCH (a:Anatomy)-[:EXPRESSES_AeG]->(g:Gene) WITH a, COUNT(g) as gene_count RETURN AVG(gene_count)
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes covary with the gene 'MYBPC2' or gene 'LIMS1'?
MATCH (g:Gene)-[:COVARIES_GcG]->(covarying:Gene) WHERE g.name = 'MYBPC2' OR g.name = 'LIMS1' RETURN covarying.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What is the average number of genes regulated by each gene?
MATCH (g:Gene)-[:REGULATES_GrG]->(regulated:Gene) WITH g, COUNT(regulated) as gene_count RETURN AVG(gene_count)
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the side effects caused by compounds that upregulate the gene 'GPATCH8' and are included in the pharmacologic class 'Thyroxine'?
MATCH (pc:PharmacologicClass {name: 'Thyroxine'})-[:INCLUDES_PCiC]->(c:Compound)-[:UPREGULATES_CuG]->(g:Gene {name: 'GPATCH8'}) MATCH (c)-[:CAUSES_CcSE]->(se:SideEffect) RETURN se.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Retrieve the anatomical locations that are localized in diseases presenting the symptom 'Obesity' and that resemble 'atherosclerosis'.
MATCH (d1:Disease {name: 'atherosclerosis'})-[:RESEMBLES_DrD]->(d2:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s:Symptom {name: 'Obesity'}) MATCH (d2)-[:LOCALIZES_DlA]->(a:Anatomy) RETURN d2.name, a.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
If a patient is taking the 'Gemcitabine' to treat his disease, what distinct symptoms he may present before the treatment?
MATCH (c:Compound {name: 'Gemcitabine'})-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s:Symptom) RETURN DISTINCT s.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the compounds and diseases that the compounds treat, knowing that the compounds cause 'Vertigo' and that the diseases present 'Headache'?
MATCH (se:SideEffect {name: 'Vertigo'})<-[:CAUSES_CcSE]-(c:Compound)-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s:Symptom {name:'Headache'}) RETURN c.name, d.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the compounds that a patient with 'ovarian cancer' takes and that cause 'Abdominal distension'?
MATCH (se:SideEffect)<-[:CAUSES_CcSE]-(c:Compound)-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease) WHERE se.name = 'Abdominal distension' AND d.name = 'ovarian cancer' RETURN c.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which diseases present the 'Paraplegia'? Find the number of compounds which treat each kind of these diseases.
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s:Symptom {name: 'Paraplegia'}) MATCH (c:Compound)-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d) RETURN d.name, COUNT(c)
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the compounds and the diseases that they treat, knowing that both the side effects caused by compounds and the symptoms presented by diseases are 'Vomiting'?
MATCH (se:SideEffect {name: 'Vomiting'})<-[:CAUSES_CcSE]-(c:Compound)-[:TREATS_CtD]->(d:Disease)-[:PRESENTS_DpS]->(s:Symptom {name: 'Vomiting'}) RETURN c.name, d.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes participate in the biological process 'cell-cell signaling' and are bound by the compound 'Triazolam'?
MATCH (c:Compound {name: 'Triazolam'})-[:BINDS_CbG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]->(bp:BiologicalProcess {name: 'cell-cell signaling'}) RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
Which genes participate in the biological process 'sexual reproduction' are downregulated by compounds included in the pharmacologic class 'Thiazolidinediones'?

MATCH (pc:PharmacologicClass {name: 'Thiazolidinediones'})-[:INCLUDES_PCiC]->(c:Compound)-[:DOWNREGULATES_CdG]->(g:Gene)-[:PARTICIPATES_GpBP]->(bp:BiologicalProcess {name: 'sexual reproduction'}) RETURN g.name
Given an input question, convert it to a Cypher query. No pre-amble.
What are the unique common biological processes shared by genes bound by compounds included in both the pharmacologic classes 'Decreased Platelet Aggregation' and 'Thyroxine' ?

MATCH (d:Disease)<-[:TREATS_CtD]-(c:Compound)-[r:BINDS_CbG]->(g:Gene) WHERE d.name CONTAINS 'liver' AND r.affinity_nM IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name, g.name, d.name, r.affinity_nM

Which are the top 5 genes with the highest downregulation 'z_score' in response to compounds that treat osteoporosis, considering only 'z_score' > -5? In case of ties, order alphabetically by gene name.

MATCH (:Disease {name: 'osteoporosis'})<-[:TREATS_CtD]-(c:Compound)-[r:DOWNREGULATES_CdG]->(g:Gene) WHERE r.z_score > -5 WITH g, MAX(r.z_score) AS max_z_score RETURN g.name, max_z_score ORDER BY max_z_score DESC, g.name ASC LIMIT 5
